<div class="viewcode-block" id="EpubReader.__init__">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.EpubReader.__init__">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="fm">__init__</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">content</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Chapter</span><span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">epub_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">page_size</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">show_header</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">show_footer</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">start_line</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">start_chapter</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">bookmark_manager</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">BookmarkManager</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">width</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Initialize the EPUB reader.</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            content: Full text content with chapter titles separated by 4 linebreaks</span>
<span class="sd">            chapters: List of Chapter objects</span>
<span class="sd">            title: Book title</span>
<span class="sd">            epub_path: Path to the EPUB file (for bookmarks)</span>
<span class="sd">            page_size: Lines per page (None for auto-detect)</span>
<span class="sd">            show_header: Show header with chapter title</span>
<span class="sd">            show_footer: Show footer with progress</span>
<span class="sd">            start_line: Initial line to display</span>
<span class="sd">            start_chapter: Initial chapter index to jump to</span>
<span class="sd">            bookmark_manager: Optional bookmark manager instance</span>
<span class="sd">            width: Maximum content width (None for full terminal width)</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">title</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">epub_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">epub_path</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chapters</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">show_header</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">show_header</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">show_footer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">show_footer</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">bookmark_manager</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">bookmark_manager</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">BookmarkManager</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_width</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">width</span>

        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">console</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Console</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_user_page_size</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">page_size</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_size</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">page_size</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_calculate_page_size</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="c1"># Process content: detect chapter boundaries and build index</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_process_content</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Set initial position</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">start_line</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">start_chapter</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">start_chapter</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start_chapter</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="c1"># Ensure current_line is valid</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_clamp_line</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># State</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_show_help</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message_style</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;green&quot;</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_running</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>

        <span class="c1"># Handle terminal resize</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_setup_signal_handlers</span><span class="p">()</span></div>


    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_setup_signal_handlers</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Setup signal handlers for terminal resize.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sys</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">platform</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;win32&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">signal</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">signal</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">signal</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">SIGWINCH</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_handle_resize</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_handle_resize</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">signum</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">frame</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Handle terminal resize signal.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">del</span> <span class="n">signum</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">frame</span>  <span class="c1"># Unused but required by signal handler signature</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_user_page_size</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_size</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_calculate_page_size</span><span class="p">()</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_calculate_page_size</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Calculate content area height based on terminal size.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">height</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">size</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">height</span>
        <span class="n">header_size</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">3</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">show_header</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="n">footer_size</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">3</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">show_footer</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="c1"># Account for content panel borders (2 lines: top + bottom)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">5</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">height</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">header_size</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">footer_size</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_clamp_line</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Clamp a line index to the available content range.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">max_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">min</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_line</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_process_content</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">content</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Process content, detect chapter boundaries, and build line index.</span>

<span class="sd">        Chapter format: A line that appears after 4+ consecutive newlines and is</span>
<span class="sd">        followed by 2 newlines is considered a chapter title.</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="c1"># Split into lines</span>
        <span class="n">raw_lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>  <span class="c1"># Line index where each chapter starts</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_titles</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>  <span class="c1"># Title for each chapter</span>

        <span class="c1"># Track consecutive empty lines to detect chapter boundaries</span>
        <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_lines</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">]</span>

            <span class="c1"># Check if this could be a chapter title:</span>
            <span class="c1"># - Has content</span>
            <span class="c1"># - Preceded by 4+ empty lines (or at start)</span>
            <span class="c1"># - Followed by 2+ empty lines</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="c1"># Count empty lines before this line</span>
                <span class="n">empty_before</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
                <span class="n">j</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
                <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">j</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">raw_lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">j</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                    <span class="n">empty_before</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
                    <span class="n">j</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

                <span class="c1"># Count empty lines after this line</span>
                <span class="n">empty_after</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
                <span class="n">j</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
                <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">j</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_lines</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">raw_lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">j</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                    <span class="n">empty_after</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
                    <span class="n">j</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

                <span class="c1"># Check if this is a chapter title</span>
                <span class="c1"># At start: no requirement for empty_before</span>
                <span class="c1"># Otherwise: need 4+ empty lines before</span>
                <span class="n">is_chapter_title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">empty_before</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="mi">4</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">empty_after</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Also check if next non-empty line exists (content follows)</span>
                    <span class="n">next_content_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">empty_after</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">next_content_idx</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_lines</span><span class="p">):</span>
                        <span class="n">is_chapter_title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>

                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">is_chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Record chapter start position</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">))</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_titles</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">())</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Don&#39;t add the title line to content (it&#39;s displayed in header)</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Skip the title and following empty lines</span>
                    <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">empty_after</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="c1"># Regular line - add to content</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

        <span class="c1"># If no chapters found, create a default one</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_titles</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Content&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_get_current_chapter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Get current chapter index and title based on line position.</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Tuple of (chapter_index, chapter_title)</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">offset</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="n">offset</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">chapter_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">i</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">break</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">chapter_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_titles</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">chapter_idx</span><span class="p">]</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_get_progress</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">float</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Get current progress.</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Tuple of (current_line, total_lines, percentage)</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">total</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">total</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mf">0.0</span>
        <span class="n">percentage</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">total</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="mi">100</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">total</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">percentage</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_scroll_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">delta</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Scroll by N lines.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">new_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">delta</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_clamp_line</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">new_line</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_scroll_page</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">delta</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Scroll by N pages.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_scroll_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">delta</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_size</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_goto_chapter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter_idx</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Jump to chapter start.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">chapter_idx</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">chapter_idx</span><span class="p">]</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_goto_start</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Go to beginning.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_goto_end</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Go to end.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_clamp_line</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_save_bookmark</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Save current position as bookmark.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_current_chapter</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">_</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">total</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">percentage</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_progress</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="n">bookmark</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Bookmark</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">create</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">chapter_index</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">line_offset</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">percentage</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">percentage</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">bookmark_manager</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">save</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">epub_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">bookmark</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Bookmark saved&quot;</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message_style</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;green&quot;</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_load_bookmark</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Load and jump to bookmark.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">bookmark</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">bookmark_manager</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">load</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">epub_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">bookmark</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
                <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;Bookmark found but content is empty; starting at beginning&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message_style</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;yellow&quot;</span>
                <span class="k">return</span>

            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_clamp_line</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">bookmark</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">line_offset</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Jumped to bookmark (</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">bookmark</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">percentage</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">.1f</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">%)&quot;</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message_style</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;green&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;No bookmark found&quot;</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message_style</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;yellow&quot;</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_read_key</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Read a key, handling escape sequences for special keys.</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Key string (may be multi-character for special keys)</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">char</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">click</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">getchar</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="c1"># Handle escape sequences</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">char</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\x1b</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Try to read more characters for escape sequences</span>
            <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="c1"># Use a short timeout approach - read what&#39;s available</span>
                <span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">select</span>

                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sys</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">platform</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;win32&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="c1"># On Unix, check if more input is available</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">select</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">select</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="n">sys</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stdin</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="p">[],</span> <span class="p">[],</span> <span class="mf">0.05</span><span class="p">)[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]:</span>
                        <span class="n">char</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">click</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">getchar</span><span class="p">()</span>
                        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">char</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;[&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                            <span class="c1"># CSI sequence - read more</span>
                            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">select</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">select</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="n">sys</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stdin</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="p">[],</span> <span class="p">[],</span> <span class="mf">0.05</span><span class="p">)[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]:</span>
                                <span class="n">char</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">click</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">getchar</span><span class="p">()</span>
                                <span class="c1"># Handle sequences like [5~ (Page Up)</span>
                                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">char</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isdigit</span><span class="p">():</span>
                                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">select</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">select</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="n">sys</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stdin</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="p">[],</span> <span class="p">[],</span> <span class="mf">0.05</span><span class="p">)[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]:</span>
                                        <span class="n">char</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">click</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">getchar</span><span class="p">()</span>
                <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="c1"># On Windows, just try to read more</span>
                    <span class="n">char</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">click</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">getchar</span><span class="p">()</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">char</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">char</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;[&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">char</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">click</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">getchar</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">pass</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">char</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_handle_key</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Handle keyboard input.</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            key: Key string</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            False to quit, True to continue</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="c1"># Clear any previous message</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

        <span class="c1"># Help toggle</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_show_help</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_show_help</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>

        <span class="c1"># Quit</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;q&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Q&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">KEY_ESC</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>

        <span class="c1"># Help</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;h&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;H&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;?&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_show_help</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>

        <span class="c1"># Navigation - line</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;j&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">KEY_DOWN</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_scroll_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;k&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">KEY_UP</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_scroll_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Navigation - page</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">KEY_PAGE_DOWN</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_scroll_page</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;b&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">KEY_PAGE_UP</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_scroll_page</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Navigation - chapter</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;n&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">chapter_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_current_chapter</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_goto_chapter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter_idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;p&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">chapter_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_current_chapter</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_goto_chapter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter_idx</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">))</span>

        <span class="c1"># Navigation - document</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;g&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">KEY_HOME</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_goto_start</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;G&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">KEY_END</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_goto_end</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="c1"># Bookmarks</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;m&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_save_bookmark</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_load_bookmark</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_get_effective_width</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Get effective content width, capped by terminal width.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_width</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="c1"># Cap width to terminal width minus some padding for borders</span>
        <span class="n">terminal_width</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">size</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">width</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">min</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_width</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">terminal_width</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_get_content_width</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Get the actual content width (for line wrapping calculations).&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">effective</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_effective_width</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">effective</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Subtract panel borders (2 chars)</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">effective</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="c1"># Use terminal width minus panel borders</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">size</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">width</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_count_visual_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Count how many visual lines a text string will occupy after wrapping.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="n">content_width</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_content_width</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="c1"># Calculate wrapped lines</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">content_width</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">//</span> <span class="n">content_width</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_header</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Panel</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render header with chapter title and progress.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter_title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_current_chapter</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">total_chapters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">header_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Text</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">header_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">style</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;bold white&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">header_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  [Chapter </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chapter_idx</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">+</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">total_chapters</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">]&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">style</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;dim cyan&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Panel</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">header_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">style</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;cyan&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">height</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">width</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_effective_width</span><span class="p">(),</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_footer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Panel</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render footer with line numbers, percentage, and key hints.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">current</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">total</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">percentage</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_progress</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="n">footer_parts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

        <span class="c1"># Line info - calculate visible range accounting for wrapping</span>
        <span class="n">target_visual_before</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_size</span> <span class="o">//</span> <span class="mi">2</span>
        <span class="n">visual_before</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">current</span>

        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">visual_before</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">target_visual_before</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="n">visual_before</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_count_visual_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">])</span>

        <span class="n">visual_total</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">start</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">total</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">visual_total</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_size</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">visual_total</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_count_visual_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">])</span>
            <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">visual_total</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_size</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="n">visual_total</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_count_visual_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">])</span>

        <span class="n">footer_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Lines </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">+</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">-</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">total</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Percentage</span>
        <span class="n">footer_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">percentage</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">.1f</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">%&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Message or key hints</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">footer_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;[</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message_style</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">]</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_message</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">[/]&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">footer_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;[dim][q]uit [h]elp[/dim]&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">footer_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;  |  &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">footer_parts</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Panel</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">from_markup</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">footer_text</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">style</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;cyan&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">height</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">width</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_effective_width</span><span class="p">(),</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_content</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Panel</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render content area with current page, centered on current line.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="c1"># Calculate which lines to display, accounting for line wrapping</span>
        <span class="c1"># We need to find lines that fit in _page_size visual lines</span>

        <span class="c1"># First, find the start position by going backwards from current_line</span>
        <span class="c1"># to fill roughly half the page</span>
        <span class="n">target_visual_before</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_size</span> <span class="o">//</span> <span class="mi">2</span>
        <span class="n">visual_before</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span>

        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">visual_before</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">target_visual_before</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="n">visual_before</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_count_visual_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">])</span>
            <span class="c1"># Account for chapter separator</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">visual_before</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

        <span class="c1"># Now collect lines going forward until we fill the page</span>
        <span class="n">visual_total</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">start</span>

        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">visual_total</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_size</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Account for chapter separator</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">visual_total</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="n">visual_total</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_count_visual_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">])</span>
            <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

        <span class="c1"># If we didn&#39;t fill the page and there&#39;s room at the start, go back more</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">visual_total</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_size</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">-=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="n">visual_total</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_count_visual_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">])</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">visual_total</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

        <span class="c1"># Get lines for display</span>
        <span class="n">display_lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="c1"># Build chapter separator line</span>
        <span class="n">content_width</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_content_width</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_sep</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u2500</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="nb">min</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">content_width</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">40</span><span class="p">)</span>  <span class="c1"># ─ horizontal line</span>

        <span class="c1"># Build content with line highlighting and chapter markers</span>
        <span class="n">content_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Text</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">line</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display_lines</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">line_num</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">i</span>

            <span class="c1"># Add chapter separator if this line starts a chapter</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">line_num</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_offsets</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="c1"># Chapter title available via self.chapter_titles but not displayed here</span>
                <span class="n">content_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chapter_sep</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">style</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;dim cyan&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># Highlight current line subtly</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">line_num</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">current_line</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">content_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">style</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;bold&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">content_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Panel</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">content_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">border_style</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;dim&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">width</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_effective_width</span><span class="p">(),</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_help_overlay</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Panel</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render help modal overlay.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Panel</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Align</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">center</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">from_markup</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">HELP_TEXT</span><span class="p">)),</span>
            <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;[bold]Help[/bold]&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">border_style</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;yellow&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">width</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_page</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Layout</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render the full page layout.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">layout</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Layout</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="c1"># Get panels</span>
        <span class="n">header</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Align</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">center</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_render_header</span><span class="p">())</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_width</span>
            <span class="k">else</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_render_header</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">footer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Align</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">center</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_render_footer</span><span class="p">())</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_width</span>
            <span class="k">else</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_render_footer</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_render_content</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">content_centered</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Align</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">center</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_width</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">content</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">show_header</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">show_footer</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">layout</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split_column</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;header&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">Layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;body&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">Layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;footer&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">layout</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;header&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">update</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">layout</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;footer&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">update</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">footer</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">show_header</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">layout</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split_column</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;header&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">Layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;body&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">layout</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;header&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">update</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">show_footer</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">layout</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split_column</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;body&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">Layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;footer&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">layout</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;footer&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">update</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">footer</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">layout</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split_column</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;body&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>

        <span class="c1"># Render body content or help overlay</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_show_help</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Show help centered over content</span>
            <span class="n">help_panel</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_render_help_overlay</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="n">layout</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;body&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">update</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Group</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">content_centered</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">Align</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">center</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">help_panel</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">vertical</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;middle&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">layout</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;body&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">update</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">content_centered</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">layout</span>
